LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER SEVAN MINASIAN'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION, STAY FORECLOSURE, AND REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES - PETITIONER'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND FOR STAY OF FORECLOSURE SALE PENDING OUTCOME OF ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO COMPLETE ARBITRATION WITHIN 75 DAYS. IF ARBITRATION IS NOT COMPLETED WITHIN THAT TIME, THE PARTIES ARE REQUIRED TO REPORT BACK TO THIS COURT ON THE REASONS ARBITRATION HAS NOT BEEN COMPLETED. RESPONDENTS ARE ORDERED TO PAY ATTORNEY FEES TO PETITIONER'S COUNSEL IN THE AMOUNT OF $3,712.50. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI; REPORTER: JOYCE LONG, CSR #8620

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Arb Award; Petition
Off Calendar Nov-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENTS JULIE BROWN AND SCOTT AAL'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD.
Appearances: James Brandan Kraus of Zacks & Freedman (956.8100) for respondents and moving parties; no other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: the motion to confirm the award is granted. Order signed. (302/EHG) Judge: Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not reported

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Arb Award; Petition
Off Calendar Nov-08-2012 Continued To Nov-20-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
RESPONDENTS JULIE BROWN and SCOTT AAL'S Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award IS Continued on the court's own motion to November 20, 2012 for responding party to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Ms. Shin shall provide courtesy copies of her opposition with a cover letter stating the new hearing date to Department 302 no later than November 9, 2012 at 4:00, or the motion will be granted. (The opposition is missing pages 1 and 8.) The Court has courtesy copies of the motion and reply. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 = (302/MJM)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Arb Award; Petition
Off Calendar Oct-30-2012 Continued To Nov-08-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Arbitration, Stay Foreclosure, And Req. For Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Aug-19-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER SEVAN MINASIAN'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION, STAY FORECLOSURE, AND REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES.
Appearances: Phil Foster of the Tour-Sarkissian Law Offices (626.7744) for petitioner and moving party; Ann Rankin of the Law Offices of Ann Rankin (510.653.8886) for respondents and opposing parties.
Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Petitioner's motion to compel arbitration and for stay of foreclosure sale pending outcome of arbitration is granted. The parties are ordered to complete arbitration within 75 days. If arbitration is not completed within that time, the parties are required to report back to this court on the reasons arbitration has not been completed. Respondents are ordered to pay attorney fees to petitioner's counsel in the amount of $3,712.50. Order signed. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR #8620
